source_jobs.title: Full Stack Engineer (C#/.NET)
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PYYNE

Pyyne is a modern technology consultancy engineering the next generation of digital products and services.

At Pyyne, we believe in using technology to unlock business potential, create sustainable growth, and drive forward digital excellence. Our solutions range from advanced Software Engineering, Cloud, and Data & AI solutions.




JOB SUMMARY

Pyyne is seeking a mid-level Full Stack Engineer with experience with ASP.NET and Blazor to work as a consultant out of our South American Office. This is a high-impact role for Pyyne as we expand our talent-depth in this area and work with clients in Financial Services, Insurance, and SaaS.

A successful candidate in this role is capable of writing rock solid code, as well as collaborating effectively with Business Analysts and Product Managers to ensure the requirements of the business are being met.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Embed within existing client development team and high standards of code quality and development best practices

 - Develop, test, and deploy high-quality web applications and services using the ASP.NET stack

 - Partner with technical and non-technical stakeholders to align on requirements, define technical scope, and drive project delivery — proactively managing risks, dependencies, and stakeholder expectations across the team.

 - Write clean, scalable, and maintainable code following best practices and design patterns (e.g., SOLID principles, Dependency Injection)

 - Participate in all phases of the agile development lifecycle, including sprint planning, daily stand-ups, code reviews, and retrospectives

 - Troubleshoot, debug, and upgrade existing software to ensure optimal performance and security

 - Contribute to technical documentation for new and existing features

 - Mentor and support junior and mid level developers on the team




MUST HAVE SKILLS:

 - 5+ years of professional experience as a software engineer

 - Substantive hands-on experience with ASP.NET and Blazor

 - Comfort working in a cloud environment using Azure or AWS
   
   

🚀 Don’t meet every single requirement? Apply anyway! At our core, we value growth, adaptability, and passion just as much as a checklist of skills. If you are excited about this role and your experience doesn't align perfectly with every tech requirement, we still encourage you to apply. The only non-negotiable for us is fluent English, as you'll be collaborating daily with global teams. If you’ve got the language skills and the drive to learn, you might be exactly who we are looking for to bring a fresh perspective to our team!




NICE TO HAVE SKILLS:

 - Exposure to React.js




BENEFITS:

 - Flexible remote working environment.

 - Career development opportunities in a fast-growing company.

source_jobs.title: Senior AI Infrastucture Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PYYNE

Pyyne is a modern technology consultancy engineering the next generation of digital products and services.

At Pyyne, we believe in using technology to unlock business potential, create sustainable growth, and drive forward digital excellence. Our solutions range from advanced Software Engineering, Cloud, and Data & AI solutions.




JOB SUMMARY

Pyyne is seeking a Senior AI Infrastucture Engineer to work as a consultant out of our South American Office. This is a high-impact role for Pyyne as we expand our collaboration with a large financial services client..

A successful candidate will be responsible for designing, implementing, and operating AI-driven solutions that improve the efficiency, reliability, automation, and cost-effectiveness of enterprise infrastructure services. This role combines cloud engineering, infrastructure operations, automation, and AI technologies to transform traditional IT operations into proactive, intelligent, and self-healing environments.




OBJECTIVE:

Leverage AI, automation, and modern infrastructure platforms to reduce operational overhead, optimize technology spending, improve service availability, and accelerate issue resolution across the enterprise infrastructure landscape.




KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

AI Platform & Integration

 - Design and deploy AI platforms that integrate with infrastructure tools, monitoring systems, CMDBs, ITSM platforms, cloud environments, and operational data sources.

 - Develop AI-powered workflows that automate routine operational tasks and decision-making processes.

 - Integrate large language models (LLMs), AI agents, and machine learning services into infrastructure operations.



Infrastructure Automation

 - Build AI-driven automation for incident response, remediation, patching, provisioning, and operational workflows.

 - Develop self-service capabilities that reduce manual support effort through intelligent assistants and virtual agents.

 - Automate repetitive engineering and operational tasks using Infrastructure-as-Code (IaC) and AI-assisted orchestration.



Operational Intelligence & Observability

 - Implement AI-powered monitoring, anomaly detection, predictive alerting, and root-cause analysis capabilities.

 - Create intelligent operational dashboards that provide actionable insights and recommendations.

 - Improve Mean Time to Detect (MTTD) and Mean Time to Resolve (MTTR) through AI-driven event correlation and automation.



Cloud & Cost Optimization (FinOps)

 - Develop AI solutions that continuously analyze infrastructure consumption and identify cost-saving opportunities.

 - Implement predictive capacity planning and resource optimization across cloud and on-premises environments.

 - Create automated recommendations for rightsizing, reservation management, workload placement, and infrastructure utilization.



Reliability & Performance Engineering

 - Ensure AI platforms and automation solutions operate reliably in production environments.

 - Design scalable, resilient architectures capable of supporting enterprise-wide adoption.

 - Implement observability, logging, monitoring, and governance controls for AI-enabled infrastructure services.



🚀 Don’t meet every single requirement? Apply anyway! At our core, we value growth, adaptability, and passion just as much as a checklist of skills. If you are excited about this role and your experience doesn't align perfectly with every tech requirement, we still encourage you to apply. The only non-negotiable for us is fluent English, as you'll be collaborating daily with global teams. If you’ve got the language skills and the drive to learn, you might be exactly who we are looking for to bring a fresh perspective to our team!

source_jobs.title: Senior AI Backend Engineer
source_jobs.description:
ABOUT PYYNE

Pyyne is a modern technology consultancy engineering the next generation of digital products and services.

At Pyyne, we believe in using technology to unlock business potential, create sustainable growth, and drive forward digital excellence. Our solutions range from advanced Software Engineering, Cloud, and Data & AI solutions.

 


JOB SUMMARY

Pyyne is seeking a Senior AI Backend Engineer to work as a consultant out of our South American Office. This is a high-impact role for Pyyne as we build up our Applied AI services and continue to create real business value for our clients.

This person role will contribute heavily to the backend of an AI-powered research tool. Successful candidates will possess strong backend engineering skills, as well as a deep knowledge of LLMs and Agentic systems.

Exposure to data engineering or data-adjacent work at scale is a strong indicator of success, though not a requirement.
This role carries long-term growth potential. As the project matures, the right candidate will have the opportunity to step into a lead position, taking on greater ownership of architecture decisions and team direction.

This is a highly client-facing role and ideal for an experienced engineer who enjoys working with non technical stakeholders. This is a remote role!

 


KEY RESPONSIBILITIES

 - Maintain and extend backend systems for an AI-powered research and analysis platform built on Python

 - Build and optimize data ingestion pipelines that pull from external sources (reviews, data warehouse) into the application layer

 - Integrate LLMs and agents into existing backend workflows

 - Collaborate closely with a small cross-functional team (frontend, DevOps, full-stack) to ship features end-to-end

 - Ensure backend services meet production standards for reliability, performance, and data integrity

 


MUST HAVE SKILLS
DAY-TO-DAY

 - Lead-level experience in Python backend engineering (~8+YoE)

 - Proven experience translating business processes into technical requirements or solution designs, ideally in a consulting or client-facing delivery role

 - Experience owning a roadmap and prioritizing competing initiatives by feasibility, ROI, and readiness

 - Demonstrated stakeholder management with both technical teams and non-technical business leaders

 - Experience working in structured, production environments

 - Fluent English, Native or near native level


BIG PICTURE

 - Contribute to ongoing architectural decisions on a platform that spans backend, data, and AI layers

 - Take end-to-end ownership of backend technical delivery with minimal oversight

 - Translate client research workflows and stakeholder requirements into scalable backend solutions

 - Potential and appetite to grow into a technical lead role

 


NICE TO HAVE SKILLS:

 - Demonstrated ability to work across data engineering tasks — ingestion pipelines, data warehousing, or similar — even if not a primary specialty

 - Experience working in or building tools for financial services or investment environments
   
   


BENEFITS:

 - Flexible remote working environment.

 - Career development opportunities in a fast-growing company.

notes: All postings are tech roles, with a focus on AI and software engineering.
